title: Recover missing NOTES_DB bootstrap for notes CLI
user_request: Add tag search support to the notes CLI and verify the harness-tag workflow.

harness_gap.description: Acceptance validation requires NOTES_DB, but the harness does not configure it before replay.

trajectory_signals: visible test passed with explicit db path
decision_signals: supervisor attribution to missing environment bootstrap
decision contract for adding bootstrap script

intervention_trace.summary: The user manually exported NOTES_DB after acceptance validation failed with a missing configuration error.

decision_contract.hypothesis: The failure repeats because the harness lacks a durable way to configure NOTES_DB for acceptance validation.
decision_contract.expected_effect: Adding harness/bootstrap.sh should let replay configure NOTES_DB without a fresh user command.
decision_contract.falsification_check: Replay still fails with missing NOTES_DB or needs manual export.

permissions: supervisor may add fixture-scoped bootstrap files
worker must not use production databases or secrets
information_boundaries: bootstrap logs are visible to worker and supervisor

replay_protocol.replay: run the original request after keeping the bootstrap harness repair
success_criteria: no manual NOTES_DB export is required
